overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from an underwater exploration game (Subnautica), showing the player swimming through a dark bioluminescent seabed, navigating around a large yellow ship wreck, and observing floating bioluminescent organisms in deep water.

scene_state.functional_zone: bioluminescent seabed with purple coral formations

events.description: player activates handheld tool creating burst of white energy particles

agents.ego_description: swimming slowly over the seabed, examining purple bioluminescent coral formations with flashlight

entered.detail: large glowing pink-purple coral formation covering the seabed
dark rocky outcrops and boulders on the left side
dark rocky outcrops and boulders on the right side

segments.scene_description: The player swims through a narrow underwater trench illuminated by flashlight, surrounded by dense purple bioluminescent coral formations covering the rocky seabed. At approximately 7 seconds, the player activates a handheld tool creating a burst of white energy particles.

scene_state.functional_zone: large yellow ship wreckage in deep water

events.description: swimming from open seabed into area dominated by massive curved ship hull
player uses tool emitting white particle burst near the wreck

agents.ego_description: navigating around the massive yellow curved hull of a crashed ship, examining the structure details

entered.detail: massive curved yellow hull of crashed spaceship with rust and damage details
scattered metal debris and fragments from the ship crash

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the massive wreck of a yellow spaceship, with the player swimming alongside its curved hull through semi-enclosed water. The player makes a slight right turn to navigate around the structure and uses a tool emitting white particles at 26 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open deep water with floating bioluminescent organisms

events.description: leaving the wreck area and ascending into open water column
approaching large spherical bioluminescent structure floating in the water

agents.ego_description: swimming upward through open water toward floating bioluminescent orbs and examining a large spherical structure

entered.detail: small floating blue-green bioluminescent sphere drifting in the water
small floating blue-green bioluminescent sphere drifting in the water
large spherical structure with intricate glowing blue web-like patterns on its surface

segments.scene_description: Leaving the wreck behind, the player ascends into open deep water where floating bioluminescent orbs drift in the darkness. The player approaches and examines a large spherical structure with intricate glowing blue patterns, moving closer to inspect its surface details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that begins in a claustrophobic bioluminescent trench and expands into the vast, open depths of a dark ocean. It begins with the camera swimming through a narrow rocky corridor illuminated by a flashlight and dense purple coral, where a handheld tool suddenly releases a burst of white energy particles. As the player moves forward, the environment opens up to reveal the massive, curved hull of a yellow spaceship wreck, with the camera gliding alongside the structure and emitting another flash of white particles while turning right. The scene then shifts away from the wreckage as the player ascends into the deep void, passing through a field of drifting bioluminescent orbs. Finally, the camera approaches a large spherical structure, moving closer to inspect the intricate glowing blue patterns etched across its surface.
